name: Chip of Creation
description:
This solid, hand-sized flake of rock is a minor piece of the {@item Stone of Creation|AitFR-AVT} and contains a portion of its power.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Linked Room", "entries": ["Each chip of creation is inextricably linked to its own demiplanar room, as per the {@spell demiplane} spell. This room exists as long as both this chip and the Stone of Creation do. A door to the room only exists when created using a {@spell demiplane} spell, whether a chip of creation is used in the casting
